description: Configure a single Bill of Materials (BoM) for the 'Ergo-Flex Desk' product template to dynamically select components based on product variants. The 'Ergo-Flex Desk' template includes attributes 'Edition' (Standard, Pro) and 'Finish' (Oak, White). The BoM should include 'Desk Frame (Universal)' and 'Assembly Hardware Kit' for all variants. Use variant logic to apply 'Standard Motor Unit' only to 'Edition: Standard', 'Pro Heavy-Duty Motor Unit' and 'Cable Management Tray' only to 'Edition: Pro', 'Oak Desktop Board' only to 'Finish: Oak', and 'White Desktop Board' only to 'Finish: White'. Confirm the configuration by creating a Manufacturing Order for an 'Ergo-Flex Desk (Pro, White)' and ensuring the correct components are reserved.
